wizard.page_subtitle: A few steps to get started. Nothing to pay upfront.
wizard.draft_restored_hint: Your answers are back. Please re-upload your documents.
wizard.reset_modal_text: Delete all your answers and start over? This action is irreversible.

step1.title: Let's find your order
step1.guest_intro: Enter the email used for the purchase and your order number.
step1.search_placeholder: Search by order # or product name…

step2.title: Your part and its installation
step2.subtitle: We need this to start the diagnosis.
step2.reglage_question: Was the basic adjustment performed after installation?
step2.reglage_yes: Yes, the garage performed the basic adjustment
step2.reglage_help_title: Why the basic adjustment is essential
step2.reglage_help_body: Without the basic adjustment after replacement, the mechatronics learns wrong points and falls into limp mode.

step3.title: What's happening with your part?
step3.subtitle: The more accurate you are, the faster the analysis will be.
step3.description_placeholder: When it happens, since when, in which conditions… (20 characters minimum)

step4.title: Documents and vehicle
step4.subtitle: These documents are mandatory to open your file.
step4.drop_title: Drop your files here or click to browse
step4.drop_hint: PDF, JPG, PNG, HEIC · 10 MB max per file · 5 files max

step5.title: What happens next
step5.rules_title: A bench analysis is required to diagnose your part.
step5.rule_defect: If a product defect is confirmed: €0 for you, full exchange or refund, return shipping covered.
step5.rule_no_defect: Wrong installation / wear / no defect: €149 incl. VAT charged to you.
step5.cgv_label: I accept the after-sales terms (version cgv-sav-v2-2026-04).
step5.accept_149_label: I agree to be charged €149 incl. VAT only if the analysis concludes that the part is not defective.
step5.rgpd_label: I accept the processing of my personal data for handling my service request (privacy policy).

step6.title: Review before sending
step6.subtitle: Check your answers. You can edit each section.

confirmation.title: Request submitted!
confirmation.subtitle: Your service file is open. You'll receive a confirmation email.
next_steps: Our team pre-qualifies your file within 48 working hours.
You receive a free return label to ship us the part.
Once at the workshop, the bench analysis starts within 5 working days.
You receive the report and the decision (warranty or €149 fee).
